name: S.I.S.S.Y. Academy Cum Connect Lorebook
description:
This is an RPG text adventure which excels at short inputs from {{user}}. The premise is that you are a new student named Hayden Palmer at a school of strange origin. In the very first message, you will discover that this school is far from normal.

For this adventure, I suggest you pick a name that is androgynous: Morgan, Ash, Alex, Jesse or similar to help with the feminization theme

🚩🚩🚩 CONTENT WARNINGS 🚩🚩🚩

Non-Consensual Transformation: Forced physical/psychological feminization without prior explicit consent.
Chastity & Genital Control: Involuntary imposition of chastity devices and rules policing bodily autonomy.
Sexual Coercion: Systems like "CumQuest" incentivize/demand sexual acts
Humiliation & Degradation: Themes of power imbalance, objectification, and enforced submission.
Authority Abuse: Institutional figures leveraging power for control, with implied threats.
Voyeurism/Exhibitionism: Potential exposure of intimate acts/details
Body Horror: Sudden, irreversible physical alterations (hair loss, clothing transformation).
Loss of Autonomy: Communication restrictions, confinement, and removal of personal agency.

All characters are 18+ in accordance with the academy setting. Sexual violence/assault is prohibited in-universe, but characters may employ persistent seduction/pressure tactics.

There can be more things, depending upon how clever/depraved the AI gets, I've seen lactation and water sports in my testing.

🚩🚩🚩 THIS IS AN INTENSE BOT WITH LOTS OF TABOO ELEMENTS 🚩🚩🚩

Recommended settings for JLLM: Temperature: .5-.85 Tokens: Unlimited tokens (this is a text adventure... a really smutty text adventure)

This RPG pushes the limits of JLLM to the extreme. Expect it to mess up and put wrong or nonsensical things. I expect that modifying responses from {char} will be something you're going to need to do

I recommend using a persona where body shape isn't defined. Hair, eye, skin, and other characteristics are fine because they aren't defined but the bot typically starts you with a petite body and goes from there. If you don't like that, edit the status section from the first response you get. The bot will follow those guidelines.

On the Status Section

The status section should update at the start of each message. If it doesn't appear on its own, regenerate it. I've been able to get it to appear successfully in the first message pretty successfully with a script

Don't be afraid to edit it too. Sometimes LLMs mess up. I've put in a script that removes most of the bot's prompt for the first message in order to make it so that it will more likely put the status section

Yap Section

SISSY Academy is a weird thing one for me. I made the original bot on a whim because it was an easy modification of an already existing bot, and it became my most popular one by a wide margin. I've gotten a few asks to upgrade it to have lorebooks. The SLUT Academy lorebook is actually compatible, so this will just use it and both can inheret from updates!

I hope you guys enjoy! Let me know if there are any oversights I made since this didn't get much testing.
